heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 151508 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)151508(a)36:2008(f)., , §§ 8(f), 15 (1st sentence), , 258.Aug. 9, 1982Pub. L. 97–23196 Stat. 257151508(b)36:2014 (1st sentence).
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)151508(a)36:2008(f)., , §§ 8(f), 15 (1st sentence), , 258.Aug. 9, 1982Pub. L. 97–23196 Stat. 257151508(b)36:2014 (1st sentence).

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of Illinois.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
